## ![](https://businessunitprofile-cdn.trustpilot.net/businessunitprofile-consumersite/public/trustpilot-shield.svg) We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. [Read more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/About-Trustpilots-review-labels?language=en_US)

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. [Read more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/How-consumers-can-flag-reviews-that-breach-our-guidelines?language=en_US)

## Review summary

Created with AI, based on recent reviews

Considering 38 reviews, reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the staff for their friendliness, helpfulness, and expertise, which significantly enhanced their trips. Many highlight the excellent service, noting that the company's smooth planning and organization made their holidays enjoyable and stress-free. The locations visited, including Ijen, Bromo, and various waterfalls, were also highly appreciated.

Reviewers frequently mention the positive user experience, emphasizing the guides' ability to make them feel safe, informed, and well-cared for throughout their journeys. The guides often went above and beyond, assisting with logistics, taking photos, and providing valuable insights into the areas.See more

### Written by the company

In the chaotic and often unregulated world of adventure tourism, Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO) stands as a singular anomaly in East Java. We are not just a travel agency; we are the region’s only expedition specialist founded and led by an active Tourist Police officer, Mr. Agung ("Mr. Sam") Sambuko.

This unique lineage defines everything we do. While other operators compete on rock-bottom prices, JVTO competes on peace of mind. Born from Mr. Sam’s years of experience protecting tourists and witnessing the gaps in local safety standards, JVTO was built to bridge the divide between wild, raw adventure and professional, verified security. When you book with us, you aren't just hiring a driver; you are engaging a team that operates with the discipline and logistical oversight of a security operation, backed by official government licensing (NIB 1102230032918).

But safety is just the foundation; connection is the experience. We believe that a tour is only as good as the person leading it. That is why we don’t use random freelancers. Our team consists of local legends like Gufron, who doubles as a professional photographer for your memories; Rendi, our technical specialist for the arduous Ijen crater descent; and Pras, a driver whose safety record is as impeccable as his English.

At JVTO, we trade in radical transparency. We will never promise you the "Blue Fire" if nature decides otherwise, nor will we hit you with hidden fees halfway up a mountain. We promise you a private, seamless, and deeply personal journey through the fires of Ijen and the mists of Bromo, knowing that behind every breathtaking moment is a rigorous infrastructure of safety watching your back.

This is East Java, verified.See more

### The TrustpilotExperience

#### We're open to all

[Anyone](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Who-can-write-a-review-and-when?language=en_US) can write a Trustpilot review. People who write reviews have ownership to edit or delete them at any time, and they’ll be displayed as long as an [account is active](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Whats-the-retention-period-of-reviews?language=en_US).

#### We champion verified reviews

Companies can ask for reviews via automatic invitations. Labeled Verified, they’re about genuine experiences.

[Learn more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/How-do-reviews-get-on-Trustpilot?utm_campaign=verified&utm_content=verified_tooltip&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=transparency_page&language=en_US) about other kinds of reviews.

#### We fight fake reviews

We use dedicated people and clever technology to safeguard our platform. Find out how we [combat fake reviews](https://www.trustpilot.com/trust/combating-fake-reviews).

#### We show the latest reviews

Learn about Trustpilot’s [review process](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/The-journey-of-reviews-on-Trustpilot?language=en_US).

#### We encourage constructive feedback

Here are [8 tips for writing great reviews](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/8-tips-for-writing-great-customer-reviews?language=en_US).

#### We verify reviewers

Verification can help ensure [real people](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Verify-your-identity-with-photo-ID?language=en_US) are writing the reviews you read on Trustpilot.

#### We advocate against bias

Offering incentives for reviews or asking for them selectively can bias the TrustScore, which goes [against our guidelines](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Who-can-write-a-review-and-when?language=en_US).

[Take a closer look](https://www.trustpilot.com/trust)

[are you human?](https://www.trustpilot.com/end-of-the-line)

![Trustpilot reviews](https://cdn.trustpilot.net/brand-assets/4.3.0/logo-white.svg)

This site is protected by reCAPTCHA. We collect device and interaction signals for security purposes as described in our [Privacy Policy](https://corporate.trustpilot.com/legal/for-reviewers/privacy-policy).
